step_by_step_thinking: I agree that excessive downward forces tend to worsen an open bite due to their tendency to increase the space between the upper and lower jaws. Additionally, such forces could potentially interfere with proper alignment if they are not managed correctly throughout orthodontic treatments, further supporting why worsening an open bite is more plausible compared to other outcomes like reducing overbite.
